tasks.title: Build Content Pipeline Tool
tasks.description: Multi-format content pipeline web app with Kanban board, 8 stages, image support, and filtering

tasks.title: Build Mission Control Calendar
tasks.description: Calendar for scheduled tasks, cron jobs, and task tracking within Mission Control

tasks.title: Build Digital Office
tasks.description: Visual office floor plan showing team members at desks with status indicators, avatars, and task info

tasks.title: Build Team Structure Screen
tasks.description: Visual org chart showing Claude as lead with all subagents organized by department, with member cards, filters, and add/edit/remove functionality

tasks.title: Migrate to Next.js
tasks.description: Scaffold Next.js 15 app with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS. Convert team structure page first, placeholder pages for the rest. REST API routes with JSON file data store.

tasks.title: Migrate Digital Office to Next.js
tasks.description: Convert standalone digital-office.html to Next.js page with React components, SWR data fetching, and full CRUD via team API. Includes workstation cards with desk/monitor graphics, quick status bar, stats, and add/edit/remove members.

tasks.title: Migrate Task Board to Next.js
tasks.description: Convert standalone taskboard.html to Next.js page with Kanban columns, task cards, stats bar, CRUD modal, and API routes backed by taskboard.json.

tasks.title: Migrate Content Pipeline to Next.js
tasks.description: Convert standalone content-pipeline.html to Next.js page with 8 stage columns, content cards, filter bar, tabbed edit form, and API routes backed by content-data.json.

tasks.title: Migrate Calendar to Next.js
tasks.description: Convert standalone calendar.html to Next.js page with month grid, event pills, recurrence support, filters, toolbar navigation, and API routes backed by calendar-data.json.
